description:
Healthcare attorney review of the LegalReviewBanner-marked surfaces (`/privacy`, `/terms`) plus the broader compliance artifact set that has grown since this ticket was scoped.

**Original scope (still applies)**
- HIPAA Notice of Privacy Practices content.
- Telehealth disclosure language.
- Refunds + cancellation matrix.
- Arbitration clause review.

**Expanded scope (post-architecture plan)**
- BAA register (`docs/compliance/baa-register.md`) — review the entities listed (AWS, MDI, Persona, Datadog, pharmacy partner) and confirm scope adequacy.
- Retention & deletion policy (T-075).
- Consent versioning model — confirm what kinds of consent are legally required vs. nice-to-have.
- State-of-residence refusal language — does it satisfy state-by-state telehealth regulations?
- LegitScript submission package (T-073) — independent legal eyes before submission.

**Acceptance**
- Attorney sign-off recorded.
- `LegalReviewBanner` removed from `/privacy` and `/terms`.
- Any required edits captured as issues and resolved before launch.
title: Healthcare attorney review of /privacy and /terms
